narrative: An Applied ML Engineer at Freshworks with eight years of experience, coming from a product‑first environment, brings solid relevance to a Senior AI/ML Search & Retrieval role. The strongest factor in the ranking is the verified depth of his machine‑learning expertise, reflected in his work with TensorFlow and scikit‑learn. He also demonstrates direct JD alignment by building retrieval pipelines using Qdrant, pgvector and the Haystack framework, and by applying PEFT fine‑tuning for domain‑specific search. His broad technical toolkit and stable career add modest points, while lower platform engagement and minor credibility flags keep him from ranking higher. Unclear notice period and a small trust concern are the main caveats.
